sections.heading: This Act may be cited as the Appropriation Act. 1989. Short tltlo
sections.text: 1. This Act may be cited as the Appropriation Act. 1989. Short tltlo

sections.heading: (l) On the authority of a. warrant Issued by the Pre,ldent, Appro•
sections.text:
2. (l) On the authority of a. warrant Issued by the Pre,ldent, Appro•
there may be expended from the general revenues of the priatlon
Republic such moneys, not exceeding In the aggregate seven-
teen thousand and slxty-tLree million, four hundred and nine-
teen thousand, nine hundred and eighty-eight kwacha, a.s may
be required for the services of the Republic during the financial
year ending on 31st Decem her, 1990.
(2) The moneys referred to lo subsection (ll shall be appro­
priated to the services of the Republlo specified In the second
column of the Schedule In amounts not exceeding the amountS
Indicated In the third column of that Schedule.
(3) On the WTltten authority of the Permanent Secretary,
Ministry of Finance. the amounts shown under the sub-heads
of the estlma tes may be varied:
Provided that:
(I) the amounts appropriated to each Head shall not
thereby be altered; and
(II) any of the amounts shown under Head 20/01 or 21
shall not be varied.
